FEDERAL BUREAU OF CONTROL OREAU ¢
S 2

Mr. Wilder, = 20
| have some bad news. You remember S Ei":fr:’, ’8
that Robert Ricardo fella we brought in as " 5‘“ ‘K_["ill 3£: N

the walls, and a strange black pillar in the center. Kinda looks like

We had a Bureau member shadowing him, but whatever happened

- Marcus
